function.content:
---
record_type: invoice
invoice_number: INV-0011
alias: helios_followup_support_invoice
issued_on: 2026-03-29
total_eur: 550
counterparty: Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH
project: Helios Workflow Sprint
related_entity: Claudia Reiter
lines:
  - item: checklist rewrite and rollout pack
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 390
    line_eur: 390
  - item: staff follow-up support
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 160
    line_eur: 160
---
# Helios rollout support invoice

```text
+----------------+---------------------------------+
| field          | value                           |
+----------------+---------------------------------+
| record_type    | invoice                         |
| invoice_number | INV-0011                        |
| alias          | helios_followup_support_invoice |
| issued_on      | 2026-03-29                      |
| total_eur      | 550                             |
| counterparty   | Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH  |
| project        | Helios Workflow Sprint          |
| related_entity | Claudia Reiter                  |
+----------------+---------------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item                               | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | checklist rewrite and rollout pack | 1   | 390      | 390      |
| 2 | staff follow-up support            | 1   | 160      | 160      |
+---+------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL                              |     |          | 550      |
+---+------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

A small late-stage invoice for rollout support after the usable version finally landed with staff.

function.outcome_justification: The inbox request in 00_inbox/000_next-task.md asked for OCR-style extraction into frontmatter. The target invoice file visibly contained all required invoice schema fields and ordered line items required by 99_system/schemas/finance-record-frontmatter.md, so a focused frontmatter migration was supported by the source note.
